scripts.ensure:rust-toolchain: export CARGO_HOME="${CARGO_HOME:-$HOME/.cargo}" && export RUSTUP_HOME="${RUSTUP_HOME:-$HOME/.rustup}" && export PATH="$CARGO_HOME/bin:$PATH" && (command -v rustup >/dev/null 2>&1 || (curl -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --profile minimal --default-toolchain stable)) && rustup toolchain install stable && rustup default stable && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown
scripts.build:vercel-docs: export CARGO_HOME="${CARGO_HOME:-$HOME/.cargo}" && export RUSTUP_HOME="${RUSTUP_HOME:-$HOME/.rustup}" && export PATH="$CARGO_HOME/bin:$PATH" && export RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable && pnpm run ensure:rust-toolchain && turbo run --env-mode=loose build:crates --filter=@jazz/rust && turbo run --env-mode=loose build --filter=docs
scripts.build: turbo run build:crates --filter=@jazz/rust && turbo run build --filter=jazz-wasm && turbo run build --filter=!jazz-rn --filter=!jazz-wasm --only
scripts.build:all: turbo run build:crates --filter=@jazz/rust && turbo run build --filter=jazz-wasm && turbo run build:rn --filter=jazz-rn && turbo run build --filter=!jazz-rn --filter=!jazz-wasm --only
